issues.sample: Having the exact same issue as was outlined and allegedly repaired in the prior service bulletin 06-001/20. Obviously this bulletin only applies to vehicles up to model year 2020. I have checked the model number on the steering motor to determine that it is the "updated" design.

narrative.headline: What 2021 Mazda Cx-3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (100% of reports).

issues.title: Steering
